task_completion.description: Create the title page with the required title and teacher name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a flipchart page containing the text 'Geometry Exit Ticket: Types of Angles' and 'Ms. Rivera'.

task_completion.description: Create a page for an acute angle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a flipchart page containing a drawing of an acute angle (less than 90 degrees) and the text label 'Acute'.

task_completion.description: Create a page for a right angle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a flipchart page containing a drawing of a right angle (90 degrees) and the text label 'Right'.

task_completion.description: Create a page for an obtuse angle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a flipchart page containing a drawing of an obtuse angle (greater than 90 degrees) and the text label 'Obtuse'.

task_completion.description: Create the final self-assessment page with colored circles and labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a flipchart page titled 'How did you do?' containing at least three colored circles (green, yellow, red) and the corresponding text labels 'Got it', 'Almost', and 'Help'.

task_completion.description: Save the flipchart with the correct filename in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a save dialog or the application title bar indicating the file is named 'geometry_exit_ticket.flipchart' and saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the interactive whiteboard GUI (ActivInspire) to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the ActivInspire interface (toolbars, page browser, canvas) being actively used, rather than terminal commands generating the file.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's built-in shape/line tools to draw the angles and circles.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the shape or line tools being selected in the toolbar, rather than pasting pre-made images from a web browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor or script to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no screenshots of text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) or python scripts being used to write the flipchart XML/file structure directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The flipchart must be exactly 5 pages long. Required text includes: 'Exit Ticket', 'Rivera', 'Acute', 'Right', 'Obtuse', and 'How did you do'. The file must be saved as 'geometry_exit_ticket.flipchart' in '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts'. The self-assessment page must contain at least 3 circle elements.
